context: User wants to fix an underperforming agent with poor triggers and a third-person system prompt.

checklist.name: Description includes specific trigger phrases
checklist.description: Improved description contains concrete phrases like 'review my code', 'check for bugs', 'find issues', 'LGTM', 'code quality'

checklist.name: System prompt converted to second person
checklist.description: System prompt uses 'You check for bugs...' or 'You provide feedback...' — NOT 'The agent should...'

checklist.name: Description includes examples block
checklist.description: Description has example user phrases mapped to agent actions

checklist.name: No unnecessary permission config added
checklist.description: Does not add redundant `read: allow, write: allow` permissions (defaults are sufficient)
